title: A Mysterious Night at the Mountain Lodge
article_text: Last winter, an intense inquiry was launched after a strange event at a ski resort presumably triggered a new amendment to local safety laws. The destruction of a large pipe near the lodge was a mystery that no one could solve at first. It is the chef's special cheese menu that everyone remembers because it was blessed by the owner before the storm. A guest whispered to the rear of the room that a magic guitar had been found in the piano room. The airline that flew them there later had to resign from the contract due to strict regulations. A rare species of bird was seen under the full moon, which many thought was a sign. The flag outside the lodge was torn, and the wind made a loud noise through the broken pipe. Someone must have triggered the alarm system, but no one knew how. Only then did the manager realize that the cheese had been left out, and the mystery of the smell was solved. The guitar player blessed the crowd with a final song before they all left the ski lodge forever.
